languages.text: "Еретик считает, что раз мы родились на одном мире, дышим одним воздухом и выглядим одинаково — то наши души, как и его, запятнаны грязными помыслами. Если сие есть чистая правда — пусть Император покарает меня на месте!" {n}Праведный гнев, отвращение... В словах юноши не чувствуется лжи. И все же вас терзает необъяснимое чувство, что мальчишка недоговаривает.{/n}

Если сие есть чистая правда — пусть Император покарает меня на месте!" {n}Праведный гнев, отвращение... В словах юноши не чувствуется лжи. И все же вас терзает необъяснимое чувство, что мальчишка недоговаривает.{/n}

languages.text: "The heretic believes that since we were born on one world, breathe the same air and look like one another, our minds must be tainted with dark thoughts just like his own. May the Emperor strike me down where I stand if he is speaking the truth!" {n}The young man is brimming with righteous anger, disgust... You sense no deception. And yet you cannot get rid of an vague feeling the kid is not telling you the entire story.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Еретик считает, что раз мы родились на одном мире, дышим одним воздухом и выглядим одинаково — то наши души, как и его, запятнаны грязными помыслами. languages.text: "Der Ketzer glaubt, dass, da wir auf einer Welt geboren wurden, dieselbe Luft atmen und einander ähnlich sehen, unser Geist genauso mit dunklen Gedanken behaftet sein muss wie der seine. Möge der Imperator mich dort, wo ich stehe, niederstrecken, wenn er die Wahrheit spricht!" {n}Der junge Mann ist erfüllt von gerechtem Zorn, Abscheu... Du spürst keine Täuschung. Und doch wirst du das vage Gefühl nicht los, dass der Junge dir nicht die ganze Geschichte erzählt.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The heretic believes that since we were born on one world, breathe the same air and look like one another, our minds must be tainted with dark thoughts just like his own. May the Emperor strike me down where I stand if he is speaking the truth!" {n}The young man is brimming with righteous anger, disgust... You sense no deception. And yet you cannot get rid of an vague feeling the kid is not telling you the entire story.{/n}

languages.text: "L'hérétique croit que puisque nous sommes nés sur un même monde, que nous respirons le même air et que nous nous ressemblons, nos esprits doivent être entachés de sombres pensées comme les siennes. Que l'Empereur me foudroie sur place s'il dit la vérité !" {n}Le jeune homme déborde de colère légitime, de dégoût... Vous ne sentez aucune tromperie. Pourtant, vous n'arrivez pas à vous débarrasser d'un vague sentiment que le jeune homme ne vous raconte pas toute l'histoire.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The heretic believes that since we were born on one world, breathe the same air and look like one another, our minds must be tainted with dark thoughts just like his own. May the Emperor strike me down where I stand if he is speaking the truth!" {n}The young man is brimming with righteous anger, disgust... You sense no deception. And yet you cannot get rid of an vague feeling the kid is not telling you the entire story.{/n}

languages.text: "这个异教徒认为，既然我们出生在同一个世界，呼吸着同样的空气，长相相似，那么我们的思想也一定和他一样，被黑暗的思想所玷污。如果他说的是真的，愿皇帝陛下把我打倒在地！"{n}这个年轻人充满了义愤、厌恶......你感觉不到任何欺骗。但你还是隐隐约约地感觉到，这孩子并没有告诉你整个故事。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The heretic believes that since we were born on one world, breathe the same air and look like one another, our minds must be tainted with dark thoughts just like his own. May the Emperor strike me down where I stand if he is speaking the truth!" {n}The young man is brimming with righteous anger, disgust... You sense no deception. And yet you cannot get rid of an vague feeling the kid is not telling you the entire story.{/n}

languages.text: "El hereje cree que ya que nacimos en un mundo, respiramos el mismo aire y nos parecemos unos a otros, nuestras mentes deben estar contaminadas con pensamientos oscuros como los suyos. Que el Emperador me derribe allí donde estoy si dice la verdad". {n}El joven rebosa de justa ira, repugnancia... No percibe ningún engaño. Y, sin embargo, no puedes deshacerte de una vaga sensación de que el chico no te está contando toda la historia.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The heretic believes that since we were born on one world, breathe the same air and look like one another, our minds must be tainted with dark thoughts just like his own. May the Emperor strike me down where I stand if he is speaking the truth!" {n}The young man is brimming with righteous anger, disgust... You sense no deception. And yet you cannot get rid of an vague feeling the kid is not telling you the entire story.{/n}

languages.text: "異端者は、私たちが一つの世界に生まれ、同じ空気を吸い、同じように見えるのだから、私たちの心も彼と同じように暗い考えに染まっているに違いないと信じている。もし彼が真実を語っているのなら、皇帝が私を打ち倒されますように！」。{n}この若者は正義の怒りと嫌悪感に満ちている...。あなたは欺瞞を感じない。しかし、あなたはこの青年が本当のことを話していないような気がしてならない。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The heretic believes that since we were born on one world, breathe the same air and look like one another, our minds must be tainted with dark thoughts just like his own. May the Emperor strike me down where I stand if he is speaking the truth!" {n}The young man is brimming with righteous anger, disgust... You sense no deception. And yet you cannot get rid of an vague feeling the kid is not telling you the entire story.{/n}

languages.text: "Kâfir, aynı dünyada doğduğumuz, aynı havayı soluduğumuz ve birbirimize benzediğimiz için zihinlerimizin tıpkı onunki gibi karanlık düşüncelerle lekelenmiş olması gerektiğine inanıyor. Eğer doğruyu söylüyorsa, İmparator beni durduğum yerde öldürsün!" {n}Genç adam haklı bir öfke ve tiksintiyle dolup taşıyor. Hiçbir aldatma sezmiyorsunuz. Yine de çocuğun size hikâyenin tamamını anlatmadığı hissinden kurtulamıyorsunuz.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The heretic believes that since we were born on one world, breathe the same air and look like one another, our minds must be tainted with dark thoughts just like his own.
